paragraphs: Software developer and applied AI engineer with 4+ years of experience building RAG pipelines, LLM-powered APIs, and distributed data systems across Amazon, Altice USA, and NGA Group. Delivered end-to-end RAG architectures using LangChain, OpenAI APIs, Pinecone, and FAISS, with verifiable accuracy gains (62% to 88%) and measurable business impact (35% reduction in ad-hoc analyst requests, 60% ticket automation).
Strong backend foundation in Python, Flask, FastAPI, PostgreSQL, AWS, and GCP.
